mappings.rationale: Directly covers metabolism, including catabolism, anabolism, cellular respiration, and the biosynthesis of cell components.
Enzymes catalyze all metabolic reactions including photosynthesis, cellular respiration, and biosynthetic pathways central to this section.
Covers photosynthesis in green plants including the chloroplast, photosynthetic pigments, and the carbon reduction cycle.
Addresses the molecular basis of metabolic processes including energy carriers, substrates, and products of catabolism and anabolism.
Covers cellular respiration in mitochondria, the site of oxidative metabolism, and the regulation of metabolic processes within cells.
Addresses the molecular mechanisms underlying biosynthesis of cell components and the regulation of metabolism at the genetic level.
Provides the thermodynamic principles underlying bioenergetics, energy conservation in cellular respiration, and the energetics of photosynthesis.
Provides context for understanding photosynthesis as the initiation of energy conversion in the biosphere and biological energy flow.
